TextView.android:text:
Start Small: Begin with 1-5 minutes daily, increasing gradually. 
Find Comfort: Sit in a chair, on a couch, or cross-legged with a straight, relaxed spine. 
focus on Breath: Use the sensation of breathing (nose or abdomen) as your anchor. 
Manage Thoughts: When your mind wanders (and it will), simply notice the thought without judgment, then return to the breath. 
Be Consistent: Daily practice is more beneficial than long, irregular sessions. 
Set the Scene: Choose a quiet spot, but don't obsess over perfection; the goal is to begin. 
Try Guided Sessions: Use apps like Headspace or Brightmind for guidance. 
Be Patient: It may take time to see benefits, but daily practice will build the habit.
